all_text: ANNOTATION Theme of final qualification work: The market of state and municipal procurement: institutional analysis of the contract system (on the example of an educational organization). Student of the group №18.MO3 - e  Kulikova  Irina  Valentinovna . The relevance of the research topic is due to the rapid development of contractual relations in the Russian Federation, the need to improve the effectiveness of the contract system in the field of state and municipal procurement, including control over the expenditure of budgetary funds. New approaches to the formation of a contract system in the field of state and municipal procurement, more effective methods for their implementation are required. An important factor in more rational spending of budgetary funds is the development of fair competition. The aim of the work is to generalize the theoretical and regulatory framework of the contract system in the market of state and municipal procurement, its institutional analysis using the concept and tools of the economic theory of contracts and theory of agent relations, as well as the development of practical recommendations on how to improve the institutional environment and organizational mechanisms of public procurement in educational services in the Russian Federation. To achieve this goal, the following tasks were solved: the current state of the market for state and municipal procurements and its features in the Russian Federation and foreign countries were investigated; analyzed the regulatory framework of state and municipal procurements, including those formed in foreign countries; identified the main trends in the development of the contract system in the field of public procurement, taking into account the theory of agent relations; the role and importance of the economic theory of contracts and institutional analysis as a whole in the study of contract systems are indicated; practical recommendations for improving the institutional environment and organizational mechanisms of public procurement in the field of educational services have been developed. The practical significance of the study lies in the fact that during the study certain shortcomings of the procurement system were identified and practical recommendations for its improvement were propose d. The activity of AN HEO  « Univers ity associated with IA EAEC »  is analyzed, as a result of which the urgent problems inherent in both the university and the contract system as a whole are identified. The developed practical recommendations will improve the efficiency of the contract system in the educational sphere. Of particular importance is the practical application of the results of research, it should be noted its importance in the international educational sphere, since the university cooperates with educational institutions of the EAEU countries. Scientific novelty lies in the application of the concepts and tools of the new institutional  economic theory to the analysis of the contract system in the field of public and municipal  procurement, as well as the proposed practical recommendations for improving the regulation of public procurement. In the research process, the following methods were used: observation, analysis and generalization of empirical facts, comparative institutional analysis,  a  systematic approach, economic and statistical analysis. Keywords: state and municipal procurement, institutional analysis, contract system, economic theory of contracts, theory of agent relations, digital transformation, digital platforms,  blockchain , smart contracts .
